info.name: School Management API
info.description: Complete API collection for School Management System with authentication, grades, classrooms, sections, teachers, students, parents, subjects, quizzes, questions, settings, and more.

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Login to get authentication token. Use type: student, teacher, or parent

item.description: Authentication endpoints for login, logout, and token management

request.description: Get dashboard statistics and recent data
Get all grades with their classrooms
Get all classrooms with their grades
Get all sections with their classrooms and teachers
Get all teachers with their specializations
